item.description: Source: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/DikonuxZmy4 No matter what Trump, MAGA, The GOP, and the Government tries to distract us with, never stop demanding the release of the Unredacted Epstein List! As Always Fuck Trump the Pedo and Convicted Felon! Fuck MAGA Fuck the GOP

item.title: Another meme dump with a fluffy dog at the end!
item.description: Dog tax: Amaterasu loves to take floor naps. She has a bed, but prefers the floor. This is because she does not know back pain. What a blessed life.

item.title: The manager does all the hard work
item.dc:creator: AdventurousDonut480

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
I think it would be a fun dnd element that commerce just opened up between your continent and a newly discovered one and it floods the market with potatoes and pineapple and such.
Robin Hood? I was in 6th grade and I was trying HARD not to cry
Me but with cocktail olives. Them MFs had my guts creaking like a pirate ship on the high seas
...all right, I'll elaborate. It's actually two new cultures making first contact, the one from the east is an analog for Spartans. They're peaceful, but their military expertise puts them in the perfect position to become city sentries and body guards. To the west, Mayans just looking to settle. Shit gets hot and heavy when the Spartans stage a coup.
Can you hear the drums, Fernando?
This schmuck with a life gain/token deck. He gets his life up to 50 and uses a sorcery that does 50 damage to me but at the price of 50 life from him. Loses immediately. It would be funnier if it wasn't a 25 minute match where I finally had him on his back foot.
item.dc:creator: stonetemplefox05

item.title: Earth News
item.description: “As an anxious person that thinks about climate change daily, reading Hi, Earth was a bleak, but enjoyable time. This was brilliant. I smiled, I giggled, I chuckled, I laughed my ass off, and then sat there in total darkness as I thought about our society’s demise. The illustration, dialogue, and execution was beautifully done.” –Susan Ha, Goodreads https://warandpeas.shop/collections/books
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: I made a Bigger, Gayer sword.
item.description:
Sorry for the Pirate Face but it hard to hold one handed.
I seem to remember that it's like... 35lbs? Hardox blade.
The tip of the pommel has been reinforced with hardfacing.
Fluffy cloud guard forge from 1/8" steel.
The Blade is about 55" long, the sword is like.... 75" long?
Here is Video of me making it: https://youtu.be/lSzzB5jc17M
item.dc:creator: michaelcthulhu
